source.reference: ACE3 rhs_B_762x39_Ball. Consensus G7 BC=0.148 (APG Doppler 0.156 vs Litz 0.138 midpoint). Type 56/M43 123gr FMJ mild steel core. G7 model for boat-tail profile.
source.methodology: BC values sourced from Bryan Litz's Applied Ballistics published Doppler radar measurements and form factor analysis.
